{% import "partials/nav-item.html" as item with context %} {% set class = "md-nav md-nav--primary" %} {% if "navigation.tabs" in features %} {% set class = class ~ " md-nav--lifted" %} {% endif %} {% if "toc.integrate" in features %} {% set class = class ~ " md-nav--integrated" %} {% endif %}
    {% if "navigation.tertiary" in features %} {% for nav_item in nav %} {% if nav_item.active and nav_item.children %} {% for nav_item in nav_item.children %} {% set path = "__nav_" + loop.index | string %} {{ item.render(nav_item, path, 1) }} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% else %} {% for nav_item in nav %} {% set path = "__nav_" + loop.index | string %} {{ item.render(nav_item, path, 1) }} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% if config.extra.community and config.extra.community.show_in_nav %}
  • {% include ".icons/siemens/link-extern.svg" %} Community
    • {% endif %}
